Friday AI Insights — The UAE Builds Its Own AI, Not Just Its Own AI Policy

UAE first: TII unveils Falcon Perception, a sovereign multimodal model, and the Presidential Court launches "Zayed," an AI-generated spokesperson. Saudi's Global AI Show turns sovereign AI into signed contracts. xAI rebrands as SpaceXAI. The EU AI Act's fines switch on August 2. And Xi Jinping launches a new global AI governance body at WAIC.

Wednesday AI Insights

The World Starts Writing AI's Rulebook

UAE eases chip export rules and merges AI policy under one federal authority. Saudi's HUMAIN partners with Cohere and xAI. OpenAI pitches Washington a 5% equity stake. The EU's Cloud and AI Development Act publishes as AI Act deadlines slip. Only 8% of organisations have real AI governance.

AI Governance Isn't Optional Anymore

The AI Race Is Becoming a Control Race
